item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: SpaceX, the largest IPO to ever hit the public market, began trading and soared 30%, making Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire.

media:content.media:text: Bret Johnsen, chief financial officer of SpaceX, center, and Spacex President Gwynne Shotwell, center right, during the company's initial public offering at the Nasdaq MarketSite in New York on Friday, June 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Bret Johnsen, chief financial officer of SpaceX, center, and Spacex President Gwynne Shotwell, center right, during the company's initial public offering at the Nasdaq MarketSite in New York on Friday, June 12, 2026.

media:content.media:text: People walk near a billboard of SpaxeX on the day of SpaceX's initial public offering at the Nasdaq MarketSite in New York on June 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A billboard welcomes SpaceX on the day of the company's initial public offering at the Nasdaq MarketSite in New York on Friday.

item.title: SpaceX stock soars in its first hours of trading, making Elon Musk a trillionaire

item.dc:creator: Joelle Gross
Javier Zarracina
Jiachuan Wu
Ashley Mowreader
Joe Murphy
item.description: Elon Musk became the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX went public Friday. Here’s how to visualize that level of wealth in charts and graphics.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

media:content.media:text: A three-dimensional rendering of the Statue of Liberty, $1.77 trillion in stacked hundred dollar bills, a SpaceX rocket and other comparable items.
media:content.media:description: $1.77 trillion, in stacked hundred dollar bills, compared to the Statue of Liberty, Elon Musk, $1.7 billion, a Tesla Model X and a SpaceX Starship.

item.title: 1,000,000,000,000 (that’s 1 trillion), in graphics

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: The World Cup opened with jubilation in Mexico City as a packed stadium roared the hosts to victory.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: General view inside the stadium as Matej Kovar #1 of Czechia passes the ball during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia at Guadalajara Stadium on June 11, 2026 in Guadalajara, Mexico.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The crowd that did show was primarily backing South Korea, and delighted in the comeback win.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Guadalajara is a city with a deep-rooted football culture.

media:content.media:text: Korea Republic v Czechia: Group A - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: The game saw all three goals scored in the second half, with the Czechs taking the lead from a long throw before the Koreans came back.

item.title: Empty seats during World Cup’s South Korea vs. Czech Republic match renew ticket price concerns

item.description: La Selección de Canadá arriba al Estadio de Toronto para iniciar su camino mundialista frente a Bosnia-Herzegovina, buscando dar alegría al público canadiense; Los europeos quieren demostrar de qué están hechos.

media:content.media:title: Canadá está listo para el Mundial | Canadá vs Bosnia | Telemundo Deportes
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Canadá arriba al Estadio de Toronto para iniciar su camino mundialista frente a Bosnia-Herzegovina, buscando dar alegría al público canadiense; Los europeos quieren demostrar de qué están hechos.

item.title: Canadá está listo para el Mundial | Canadá vs Bosnia | Telemundo Deportes

item.description: La artista paraguaya que pinta botines revela cómo una obra inspirada en Lionel Messi cambió su vida. Lo que pensó sería el final de su carrera artística terminó convirtiéndose en la oportunidad que le abrió las puertas del fútbol internacional.

media:content.media:title: Lili Cantero: “Si iba a cerrar mi carrera, que sea pintando para Messi” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: La artista paraguaya que pinta botines revela cómo una obra inspirada en Lionel Messi cambió su vida. Lo que pensó sería el final de su carrera artística terminó convirtiéndose en la oportunidad que le abrió las puertas del fútbol internacional.

item.title: Lili Cantero: “Si iba a cerrar mi carrera, que sea pintando para Messi” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: William Prince, Alessia Cara, Jessie Reyez, Elyanna y más pusieron ritmo a una ceremonia que abrió las puertas al Mundial 2026 en suelo canadiense, en una celebración marcada por la identidad y el espíritu del país.

media:content.media:title: ¡Revívelo aquí! Canadá le da la bienvenida al mundo con una celebración de música, color y cultura
media:content.media:description: William Prince, Alessia Cara, Jessie Reyez, Elyanna y más pusieron ritmo a una ceremonia que abrió las puertas al Mundial 2026 en suelo canadiense, en una celebración marcada por la identidad y el espíritu del país.

item.title: ¡Revívelo aquí! Canadá le da la bienvenida al mundo con una celebración de música, color y cultura

item.description: El mediocampista de Seattle Sounders y seleccionado de Estados Unidos reconoce que tuvo dudas sobre su convocatoria al Mundial 2026. Ahora asegura sentirse en uno de los mejores momentos de su carrera y listo para representar al USMNT.

media:content.media:title: Cristian Roldán: “No sabía si iba a llegar” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista de Seattle Sounders y seleccionado de Estados Unidos reconoce que tuvo dudas sobre su convocatoria al Mundial 2026. Ahora asegura sentirse en uno de los mejores momentos de su carrera y listo para representar al USMNT.

item.title: Cristian Roldán: “No sabía si iba a llegar” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Así es la conexión de un colombiano con la Selección de Estados Unidos. Los sigue a todas partes y hasta tuvo la oportunidad de intervenir en el look de los campeones del mundo.

media:content.media:title: El barbero de las estrellas del fútbol: La historia detrás de los peinados del Team USA
media:content.media:description: Así es la conexión de un colombiano con la Selección de Estados Unidos. Los sigue a todas partes y hasta tuvo la oportunidad de intervenir en el look de los campeones del mundo.

item.title: El barbero de las estrellas del fútbol: La historia detrás de los peinados del Team USA

item.description: Apoyo incondicional recibirá la estrella de Paraguay en el que será su primera aventura mundialista.

media:content.media:title: Miguel Almirón contará con el impulso de su familia en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Apoyo incondicional recibirá la estrella de Paraguay en el que será su primera aventura mundialista.

item.title: Miguel Almirón contará con el impulso de su familia en el Mundial 2026

item.description: Debieron transcurrir tes mundiales para que el delantero mexicano pudiera ver portería y no pudo contener la emoción tras marcarle a Sudáfrica.

media:content.media:title: El gol y las lágrimas de Raúl Jiménez son lo Mejor de Día
media:content.media:description: Debieron transcurrir tes mundiales para que el delantero mexicano pudiera ver portería y no pudo contener la emoción tras marcarle a Sudáfrica.

item.title: El gol y las lágrimas de Raúl Jiménez son lo Mejor de Día

item.description: El equipo de Javier Aguirre debutó con triunfo ante Sudáfrica y se fue a la cima del Grupo A, mientras Corea del Sur le sigue tras su remontada ante Chequia. La afición mexicana enloqueció y festejó por todo el mundo.

media:content.media:title: México líder: así quedó el Grupo A tras el primer día del Mundial | Todo el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El equipo de Javier Aguirre debutó con triunfo ante Sudáfrica y se fue a la cima del Grupo A, mientras Corea del Sur le sigue tras su remontada ante Chequia. La afición mexicana enloqueció y festejó por todo el mundo.

item.title: México líder: así quedó el Grupo A tras el primer día del Mundial | Todo el Mundial

item.description: Así se vivió la fiesta desde las gradas en el Estadio Guadalajara, durante el partido del Mundial 2026 entre República de Corea y Chequia. Los asiáticos se ganaron el corazón de México entonando el Cielito Lindo y sumándose a la icónica ola.

media:content.media:title: Con bigote y sombrero: aficionados coreanos cantan Cielito Lindo y conquistan Guadalajara
media:content.media:description: Así se vivió la fiesta desde las gradas en el Estadio Guadalajara, durante el partido del Mundial 2026 entre República de Corea y Chequia. Los asiáticos se ganaron el corazón de México entonando el Cielito Lindo y sumándose a la icónica ola.

item.title: Con bigote y sombrero: aficionados coreanos cantan Cielito Lindo y conquistan Guadalajara

item.description: El conjunto asiático protagonizó una vibrante voltereta ante República Checa en el Estadio Guadalajara con goles de Hwang In-Beom y Oh Hwang y Oh, con lo que se va a la cima del Grupo A junto a México con tres puntos en inicio del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Corea del Sur firma emocionante remontada ante Chequia en su debut en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: El conjunto asiático protagonizó una vibrante voltereta ante República Checa en el Estadio Guadalajara con goles de Hwang In-Beom y Oh Hwang y Oh, con lo que se va a la cima del Grupo A junto a México con tres puntos en inicio del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Corea del Sur firma emocionante remontada ante Chequia en su debut en el Mundial 2026

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.description: Officials in Midland, Texas, say that a suspected shooter is dead after a standoff with police. At least one person was killed and several others were injured in the incident.

media:content.media:title: Suspect is dead after standoff in Texas shooting
media:content.media:description: Officials in Midland, Texas, say that a suspected shooter is dead after a standoff with police. At least one person was killed and several others were injured in the incident.

item.title: Suspect is dead after standoff in Texas shooting

item.description: More than a dozen tornadoes left a path of destruction across the Midwest with damage reported in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin. This comes as the East Coast is facing sweltering temperatures. NBC News' Maggie Vespa has the latest.

media:content.media:title: Multiple tornadoes leave a path of destruction across the Midwest
media:content.media:description: More than a dozen tornadoes left a path of destruction across the Midwest with damage reported in Illinois, Indiana and Wisconsin. This comes as the East Coast is facing sweltering temperatures. NBC News' Maggie Vespa has the latest.

item.title: Multiple tornadoes leave a path of destruction across the Midwest

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
Anagilmara Vílchez
Ronny Rojas
item.description: Bryan José Rojas Galofre wanted to give his wife a lovely honeymoon to see the beach for the first time and perhaps a glimpse of President Donald Trump, whom she supports

media:content.media:text: Bryan Rojas junto con su esposa Socorro Zaragosa, y sus dos hijos.
media:content.media:description: Bryan Rojas alongside his wife, Socorro Zaragosa, and children.

media:content.media:text: The couple now has two children. The youngest one is 2 months old.
media:content.media:description: Bryan Rojas alongside his wife, Socorro Zaragosa, and children.

item.title: He took his wife, a Trump fan, to the president’s hotel in Doral. Instead he was detained by ICE.

item.description: Legendary golfer Phil Mickelson was kicked out of the San Diego club following allegations that he made inappropriate physical contact with a female employee, according to a report by Golf Digest. NBC News’ Emilie Ikeda reports.

media:content.media:title: Phil Mickelson banned from golf club over misconduct allegations
media:content.media:description: Legendary golfer Phil Mickelson was kicked out of the San Diego club following allegations that he made inappropriate physical contact with a female employee, according to a report by Golf Digest. NBC News’ Emilie Ikeda reports.

item.title: Phil Mickelson banned from golf club over misconduct allegations

item.description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

media:content.media:title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump called off strikes on Iran, saying a deal to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key trade route, would soon be “finalized.” NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Jerusalem on what could happen next and what Tehran is saying.

item.title: When could an Iran peace deal be finalized?

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When the United States men’s national team takes the pitch for its first World Cup match, its players’ feet will land on newly installed grass at SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, typically the home of the NFL’s Los Angeles Rams and Los Angeles Chargers.

media:content.media:text: Stadium.
media:content.media:description: Workers install the pitch at New York New Jersey Stadium (temporarily renamed from MetLife Stadium) ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup on May 7, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A rainbow is seen on the pitch at halftime as the grounds crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025.
media:content.media:description: The crew waters the grass during the FIFA Club World Cup 2025 semifinal match at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, N.J.

item.title: Turf wars: Why the World Cup is a ‘slap in the face’ to NFL players

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: Firefighters on Friday continue to manage a massive blaze that started Thursday and destroyed a 1 million-square-foot medical supply warehouse in Tracy, California

media:content.media:text: Fire at medical supply warehouse in Tracy, CA on June 11, 2026
media:content.media:description: The fire at a medical supply warehouse in Tracy, Calif., on Thursday.

item.title: Fire destroys medical supply warehouse in Tracy, California

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
Daniel Arkin
item.description: Blake Lively can recover her legal fees from her “It Ends With Us” co-star Justin Baldoni’s production company, but she is not entitled to additional damages for harm caused by his defamation claims, a federal judge ruled Friday.U.S.

media:content.media:text: Actress Blake Lively leaves federal court following a court-ordered settlement conference in her civil lawsuit against actor and director Justin Baldoni related to the film "It Ends With Us," in New York on Thursday.
media:content.media:description: Blake Lively, seen here leaving federal court in New York on Feb. 11, following a court-ordered settlement conference in her civil lawsuit against actor and director Justin Baldoni related to the film "It Ends With Us."

item.title: Blake Lively can seek legal fees but no damages in Justin Baldoni defamation case, judge rules

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Ryan J. Reilly
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: A federal judge in Virginia extended her block on the Trump’s “anti-weaponization fund”, citing frustration that the Justice Department has not said under oath if it’s truly dead.

media:content.media:text: Trump Opens Protected Pacific Ocean Areas To Commercial Fishing
media:content.media:description: A federal judge indefinitely blocked the Trump administration's "anti-weponization" fund, citing frustration that none of the Justice Department's statements declaring it over had been made under "penalty of perjury."

item.title: Federal judge indefinitely blocks Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund

item.dc:creator: Mosheh Gains
Laura Strickler
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The Pentagon on Friday released a third batch of vintage classified files related to “flying saucers” and other unidentified anomalous phenomena — better known to most Americans as unidentified flying objects, or UFOs — that the government has been hanging on to for decades

media:content.media:text: In July 2025, at approximately 2100 local time in the northeastern United States, an eyewitness observed an intense bright light in their backyard as they parked their car upon returning home from work.
media:content.media:description: In July 2025, at approximately 2100 local time in the northeastern United States, an eyewitness observed an intense bright light in their backyard as they parked their car upon returning home from work.

media:content.media:text: In October 2024, at approximately 1851 local time in the northeastern United States, an eyewitness observed a light source below the horizon, hovering above a pond at an estimated distance of 2,700 feet.
media:content.media:description: In July 2025, at approximately 2100 local time in the northeastern United States, an eyewitness observed an intense bright light in their backyard as they parked their car upon returning home from work.

media:content.media:text: The FBI's 62-HQ-83894 case file includes investigative records, eyewitness testimonies, and public reports concerning Unidentified Flying Objects and flying discs documented between June 1947 and July 1968. The records include high-profile incident accounts, photographic evidence from sites like Oak Ridge, TN, and technical proposals regarding potential propulsion systems. Additional topics include convention programs, researcher accounts, and extensive media coverage from the period. This file is partially posted on FBI vault with more redactions and some pages missing. Included here is the complete case file with several newly declassified pages and only minor redactions.
media:content.media:description: In July 2025, at approximately 2100 local time in the northeastern United States, an eyewitness observed an intense bright light in their backyard as they parked their car upon returning home from work.

item.title: Third batch of declassified UFO files reveals sightings around the world were investigated

item.dc:creator: Albinson Linares
Anagilmara Vílchez
Ronny Rojas

media:content.media:text: The couple now has two children. The youngest one is 2 months old.
